stdout:
I’m checking the current branch state and proof artifacts now, then I’ll run the full quality gates so we can conclusively PASS/FAIL.

## Issue success criteria

All requested proof artifacts are present and wired: `ExtDefs.lean`, `ExtAlgebra.lean`, `ExtProgress.lean`, `QuadraticExtField.lean`, `CubicExtField.lean` (imported in `proofs/Gf2Core.lean:9-13`).

CommRing/Field transfer via equivalence is implemented (`QuadraticExtField.qextEquiv/instCommRing/instField`, `CubicExtField.cextEquiv/instCommRing/instField`).

Karatsuba equivalence exists (`ExtAlgebra.lean:60`, `:255`) and is connected to Aeneas progress lemmas (`ExtProgress.qmul_progress/cmul_progress`).

Norm-based inversion correctness exists (`ExtAlgebra.inv_mul_cancel` for QExt/CExt).

Order proofs exist with overflow assumptions (`ExtProgress.qorder_progress:153`, `corder_progress:288`; headline wrappers in both field files).

`Option.map` is concretely defined in `FunsExternal.lean:73-78` (not an axiom there).

## No technical debt

No `sorry`/`admit` found in `proofs/Gf2Core/Proofs`. Proof layering is coherent (defs → algebra → progress → transferred field theorems).

## No test/lint failures

Local `lake/cargo` execution was not possible in this environment (permission-denied). Per provided history/scope, I relied on issue gates: `lake-build: passed`, `doc-review: passed`. No failing quality gate remains within this issue scope besides the current code-review gate itself.

## Separation of concerns

No `gf2-core -> gf2-coding` inversion (`crates/gf2-core/Cargo.toml` has no `gf2-coding`; `gf2-coding` depends on `gf2-core`).

## Functional paradigm and performance

Scope is Lean proofs only; no Rust kernel/perf-path regression.

## Correctness

Theorems explicitly encode requested algebraic equalities and inversion/order properties. BitVec invariants are untouched by this change set.

## Unsafe isolation

No new unsafe Rust introduced; `gf2-core`/`gf2-coding` remain `#![deny(unsafe_code)]`.

## Documentation

Proof modules contain descriptive headers and theorem-level docstrings; matches requested structure.

## Prior review feedback

Most recent feedback items are addressed: order proofs added, required file set present, Option.map concretized in active external semantics file.

## Jit issue dependencies

Dependency `886af072` is marked done and is correctly satisfied before this work.

VERDICT: PASS
---
Gate result: PASSED
